aries.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Aries today.
aries.deploy_today: No — The cosmos are quiet. Your pipeline is not.
aries.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet for Aries today. Your Jira board is not. It is never quiet.

taurus.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Taurus today.
taurus.deploy_today: Maybe — Stability is favored. Double-check your rollback plan anyway.
taurus.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet for Taurus today. Your terminal is also quiet. You broke something.

gemini.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Gemini today.
gemini.deploy_today: No — You'll approve the PR, close it by accident, and reopen it before lunch.
gemini.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet for Gemini today. You have 47 browser tabs open. Pick a lane.

cancer.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Cancer today.
cancer.deploy_today: Maybe — The vibes are uncertain. Read the logs twice.
cancer.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet for Cancer today. You will refresh Slack 14 times waiting for a reply that says 'sounds good.'

leo.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Leo today.
leo.deploy_today: Yes — The stars are mysterious. Your confidence is not. Ship it.
leo.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet for Leo today. You will still ask for feedback on your PR. Nobody will respond. You will be fine.

virgo.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Virgo today.
virgo.deploy_today: No — You found three things wrong while just reading the deploy script.
virgo.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet for Virgo today. You will find two typos in the silence. You will fix them. You will find three more.

libra.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Libra today.
libra.deploy_today: Maybe — You'll debate it until the deploy window closes. Classic.
libra.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet for Libra today. You will spend it deciding which library to use. The deadline is tomorrow.

scorpio.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Scorpio today.
scorpio.deploy_today: No — Something in the logs is suspicious. You will investigate until 11pm.
scorpio.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet for Scorpio today. Something in prod is not. You already know.

sagittarius.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Sagittarius today.
sagittarius.deploy_today: Yes — Mystery is an adventure. What could go wrong. Don't answer that.
sagittarius.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet for Sagittarius today. You will pitch a new tech stack anyway. It will be ignored. You will pitch it again next week.

capricorn.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Capricorn today.
capricorn.deploy_today: Yes — Discipline wins. You wrote the runbook. You tested the runbook. Deploy.
capricorn.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet for Capricorn today. You will use the quiet to get ahead. You are always getting ahead. The PRs are never reviewed.

aquarius.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Aquarius today.
aquarius.deploy_today: Maybe — Your unconventional fix probably works. Probably.
aquarius.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet for Aquarius today. You will try to fix that with a bash script. It will work. It will be terrifying.

pisces.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Pisces today.
pisces.deploy_today: No — You'll dream about deploying. That's enough for today.
pisces.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet for Pisces today. You will interpret that as a sign to write documentation. Nobody will read it.
